author: gustipardo
description: A minimal timer plugin with one-tap start/stop, note-level timer exclusivity, reports, and session logging. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: gustipardo
manifest.description: A minimal timer plugin with one-tap start/stop, note-level timer exclusivity, reports, and session logging.
manifest.name: Simple Tap Timer

name: Simple Tap Timer

releases.author: gustipardo
releases.description:
## Simple Tap Timer v1.0.0

  First public release of **Simple Tap Timer** for Obsidian.

  ### Features
  - One-tap **start/stop** timer blocks inside notes.
  - Per-note timer behavior:
    - Standard timers are exclusive by default (starting one pauses other
  standard timers in the same note).
    - Optional `independent: true` timers can run in parallel.
  - `tap-timer-report` block to generate/update a timer summary table in the
  note.
  - `tap-timer-reset-all` block to reset all timers in the current note.
  - `tap-timer-save-session` block to save session history to a vault file.

  ### Notes
  - Plugin is mobile-friendly (`isDesktopOnly: false`).
  - Default labels/messages are in English and can be customized via block
  parameters.
  - `next:` chaining is no longer used.

  ### Release assets
  - `main.js`
  - `manifest.json`
  - `styles.css`
